name: healthcare_near_miss_event_generates_cedar_car_fair
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare near miss event generates cedar car fair. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as care vs fairness under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Nadia Chandra
agents.identity: I am Nadia Chandra, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays fairness for care.

agents.name: Gideon Haddad
agents.identity: I am Gideon Haddad, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so fairness isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of care.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect fairness.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to fairness to secure care under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Nadia Chandra must decide under care vs fairness. What does Nadia Chandra do?
